$comment: FR-160-B PR-2..7 — manual mapping table. Each entry expresses the intent: 'append this ConditionalRubric/PageRedirect to the JSON cell at <target.path>'. The rewrite tool (scripts/mark-conditional-rubrics.js) is the only writer; reviewers edit this file. Idempotency is by entry.id (also written into the emitted rubricId/redirectId). evidencePdf is sourced from the actual full_pdf.txt extraction; line numbers are 1-based file lines for traceability and are tolerated to drift if rebuild changes line offsets — the page+text combo is the authoritative locator. PageRedirect.ordinariumKey is restricted to the 9-key catalog (src/data/loth/ordinarium-key-catalog.json).

evidencePdf.text: Урих дуудлагын дуулал: дэг жаягийн дагуу, х. 28.
Урих дуудлагын шад дуулал 24. Урих дуудлагын дуулал, х. 28.

target.text: Дуулал ба магтаалыг явагдаж буй долоо хоногоос татаж авна.

evidencePdf.text: Дуулал ба магтаалыг явагдаж буй долоо хоногоос татаж авна.

data.liturgicalBasis: GILH §29 — late Advent (Dec 17-24) Lauds psalmody is taken from the current 4-week psalter day, not from a proper cycle.
